metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose a plan that fits your fitness goals

comparison.title: Choose the access level that matches your training rhythm
comparison.description: Free access is built for trying the generator and previewing one workout angle. Starter and Pro subscriptions unlock progressively broader workout video access and more complete viewing options.

items.title: Free Access
items.description: Best for first-time visitors who want to test AI workout generation before committing to a subscription.

items.title: Starter Subscription
items.description: Unlocks free and starter-level workout videos, making it the right fit for regular users who want a fuller guided training experience.

items.title: Pro Subscription
items.description: Unlocks free, starter, and pro workout videos for users who want the broadest library and the most complete experience.

faq.title: Questions about subscriptions and access
faq.description: These answers clarify how free access differs from Starter and Pro subscriptions on the video side.

items.question: Can I generate videos without subscribing?
items.answer: Yes. Free users and even visitors who are not logged in can generate videos, but the result view is limited to a single visible workout angle.

items.question: What does Starter unlock?
items.answer: Starter unlocks both free and starter access type videos, giving subscribers a broader set of workout results than the free experience.

items.question: What does Pro unlock?
items.answer: Pro unlocks free, starter, and pro access type videos, which gives the widest workout coverage and the fullest result set.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Turn everyday objects into personalized workout videos with AI. Choose the access plan that fits your training rhythm and upgrade to subscription access when you want the full experience.

items.title: Free Access
items.description: Start your AI fitness journey for free. Perfect for trying the generator and seeing one guided workout angle before upgrading.
features: Generate workout videos in free mode
Single visible workout angle per video
No subscription required to get started
items.tip: No credit card required. Start generating workout videos today.

items.title: Starter Subscription
items.description: Unlock the full guided workout experience with subscription access built for regular training.
items.tip: Upgrade from free mode and unlock the complete workout viewing experience.

items.title: Pro Subscription
items.description: Most Popular. Best for consistent training, richer workout variety, and unlocking the strongest value from the platform.
items.label: Most Popular
features: Share more guided routines with family and friends
items.tip: Best value for members who want the fullest training experience.

messages.seo_tooltip_content: Our pricing is designed to guide visitors from free access into subscription-style workout access. Free users can try the generator first, while paid plans unlock fuller workout viewing and a more complete training experience.
seo_body_paragraphs: The pricing page is designed to help visitors compare free access with paid subscription-style plans for AI fitness video generation.
Some users only need a lightweight free entry point to test the generator, while others want a fuller training experience with all workout angles unlocked.
The comparison and FAQ sections explain what each access level is best suited for and how to choose between trying the product for free and upgrading for more complete workout access.
messages.seo_plan_summary: Current options on this page include {plans}, giving visitors a clear way to choose between first-time access, occasional creation, and more consistent video use.
